description: Tempdoc 577 Goal 3 §3.7 — the full 570 Move H: intent-tier coverage projecting from the shape catalog. The one interaction window (UnifiedChatView) escalates one input across intent tiers; every LLM tier maps to exactly one registered conversation shape, and the `retrieve` BASE tier maps to NO shape (§3.3: pure retrieval via searchState, not a ConversationShape). This gate projects coverage FROM the Java shape authority (CoreConversationShapeCatalog.CORE_USER_INTERACTION_SHAPES): (1) every core user-interaction shape is reachable from exactly one tier; (2) the window's `presetByShape` routing table matches the declared tier→shape map byte-for-byte (a silent re-route, or a shape with no tier, fails); (3) the `retrieve` base tier is shape-less and its non-LLM seam (`submitSearch`) is present — so a tier rendered without a shape (other than retrieve) or a `retrieve` wired to an LLM dispatch is unrepresentable. The 'shape rendered outside the window' half is covered by the sibling `interaction-surface` gate's second-view backstop. Honest limit: regex-parses the `presetByShape` literal + the Java Set.of — a refactor to a computed table is import-invisible to this scan (register + discipline, the same ceiling as search-issuance / steering-arbitration).
